name: ololand-dd
description: Institutional due diligence for Claude — deterministic DCF / LBO / Monte Carlo / Real Options engines, 246-category risk taxonomy with industry overlays (SaaS, healthcare, real estate, industrial), forensic QoE primitives (Beneish, Benford, EBITDA bridge, journal-entry testing, lapping detection), cross-document reconciliation with source hierarchy (CPA > tax > management > AI), MaskablePPO war-game competitive simulation, middle-office assumption controls that gate IC approval, observability M1+M2 audit trail (agent_runs, agent_spans, regulator-grade replay, compliance-framework exports), OloNet competitive-intel feed, and a flywheel that retrains from analyst corrections. Three sub-agents: dd-analyst, forensic-screener (Pre-LOI 7-primitive forensic battery), war-game-strategist (16-quarter competitive simulation). Commands now include /firm-playbook (firm's standing institutional config — WACC ranges, IRR targets, EV-multiple ceilings, approval thresholds, custom rules) alongside /verify, /remember and /recall (persistent deal record), /inspect-run, /replay-run, /regulator-export, /plan, /ai-finserv-moves, /pre-screen, /ic-memo-skeptical, /assumption-controls, /ic-approve-readiness, /playbook-recall, /calibrate-vs-history. Agent-loadable industry-DD skills (SaaS, healthcare, real estate, industrial) enforce sector-specific KPI discipline; the partner-signoff skill gates IC memos, regulator exports, and RWI packets behind explicit partner approval. Counter-positions Anthropic's native private-equity plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Institutional due diligence for M&A and private equity.

defaultPrompt: Run due diligence on the sample deal.
Build a risk report for a deal.
